Title: Cowboy Bebop: The Movie - Knockin' on Heaven's Door
Director: Shin'ichirô Watanabe, Tensai Okamura, Hiroyuki Okiura
Actors: Beau Billingslea, Melissa Fahn, Nicholas Guest
Plot: A terrorist explosion releases a deadly virus on the masses, and it's up to the bounty-hunting Bebop crew to catch the cold-blooded culprit.
